content.query:
SELECT
Count(EmployeeID) as EmployeeID,
Count(CivilServiceStart) as CivilServiceStart,
Count(DateToCurrentJob) as DateToCurrentJob,
Count(OrgStartDate) as OrgStartDate,
Count(DateToSubstantiveGrade) as DateToSubstantiveGrade
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]

SELECT
EmployeeID as EmployeeID,
CivilServiceStart as CivilServiceStart,
DateToCurrentJob as DateToCurrentJob,
OrgStartDate as OrgStartDate,
DateToSubstantiveGrade as DateToSubstantiveGrade
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim]
WHERE IsActive = 'Y'
